headline: DexCom Inc (NASDAQ:DXCM) Fits the Affordable Growth Investment Strategy
summary: DexCom (DXCM) exemplifies GARP investing, offering strong growth in glucose monitoring at a price reasonable relative to its industry and supported by robust profitability.
